content:
第一次投稿，有點緊張。

如果有人不懂的話，這人是阿爾比諾！他真的好帥啊啊啊！ ！為什麼還沒有配音！紳士真的超戳我的！

畫的不好+有私設，請見諒

I want him to be a playable character omgg

sorry my drawing not that good and I also added my ideas into it, apologise if not done well TwT

uid：100425926

大家如果不介意也可以跟我這個萌新交朋友，如果你認為有什麼需要改進的東西也可以告訴我。

you guys can make friend with me, hope you don't mind me as a noob in the game.If there is anything you would like me to improve, feel free to tell me!
